src/components/ui/chart.tsx:function getPayloadConfigFromPayload(

src/components/ui/chart.tsx:  payload: unknown,
src/components/ui/chart.tsx:  key: string
src/components/ui/chart.tsx:) {
src/components/ui/chart.tsx:  if (typeof payload !== "object" || payload === null) {
src/components/ui/chart.tsx:    return undefined
src/components/ui/chart.tsx:  }
src/components/ui/chart.tsx:
src/components/ui/chart.tsx:  const payloadPayload =
src/components/ui/chart.tsx:    "payload" in payload &&
src/components/ui/chart.tsx:    typeof payload.payload === "object" &&
src/components/ui/chart.tsx:    payload.payload !== null

src/components/ui/chart.tsx:      : undefined
src/components/ui/chart.tsx:

src/components/ui/chart.tsx:    key in payload &&
src/components/ui/chart.tsx:    typeof payload[key as keyof typeof payload] === "string"
src/components/ui/chart.tsx:  ) {

src/components/ui/chart.tsx:  } else if (
src/components/ui/chart.tsx:    payloadPayload &&
src/components/ui/chart.tsx:    key in payloadPayload &&
src/components/ui/chart.tsx:    typeof payloadPayload[key as keyof typeof payloadPayload] === "string"
src/components/ui/chart.tsx:  ) {

src/components/ui/chart.tsx:    ] as string
src/components/ui/chart.tsx:  }
src/components/ui/chart.tsx:
src/components/ui/chart.tsx:  return configLabelKey in config ? config[configLabelKey] : config[key]
src/components/ui/chart.tsx:}

src/components/SongRequests.tsx:const SongRequests: React.FC<SongRequestsProps> = ({ artistId }) => {
src/components/SongRequests.tsx:  const [requests, setRequests] = useState<SongRequest[]>([]);
src/components/SongRequests.tsx:  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
src/components/SongRequests.tsx:  const { addNotification } = useAudio();
src/components/SongRequests.tsx:
src/components/SongRequests.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/components/SongRequests.tsx:    const q = query(collection(db, 'songRequests'), where('artistId', '==', artistId));
src/components/SongRequests.tsx:    const unsubscribe = onSnapshot(q, (snapshot) => {
src/components/SongRequests.tsx:      const reqs = snapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() } as SongRequest));
src/components/SongRequests.tsx:      setRequests(reqs);
src/components/SongRequests.tsx:      setLoading(false);
src/components/SongRequests.tsx:    }, (error) => {
src/components/SongRequests.tsx:      handleFirestoreError(error, OperationType.GET, 'songRequests');
src/components/SongRequests.tsx:      setLoading(false);
src/components/SongRequests.tsx:    });
src/components/SongRequests.tsx:    return () => unsubscribe();
src/components/SongRequests.tsx:  }, [artistId, addNotification]);
src/components/SongRequests.tsx:
src/components/SongRequests.tsx:  const updateRequestStatus = async (requestId: string, status: 'accepted' | 'fulfilled' | 'rejected') => {
src/components/SongRequests.tsx:    try {
src/components/SongRequests.tsx:      await updateDoc(doc(db, 'songRequests', requestId), { status });
src/components/SongRequests.tsx:      addNotification(`Request ${status}!`, "success");
src/components/SongRequests.tsx:    } catch (error) {
src/components/SongRequests.tsx:      console.error("Error updating request:", error);
src/components/SongRequests.tsx:      addNotification("Failed to update request.", "error");
src/components/SongRequests.tsx:    }
src/components/SongRequests.tsx:  };
src/components/SongRequests.tsx:

src/components/SongRequests.tsx:  return (
src/components/SongRequests.tsx:    <div className="space-y-4">

src/components/SongRequests.tsx:      ) : (

src/components/TaskCard.tsx:

src/components/TaskCard.tsx:        onToggle(task.id, task.total);

src/components/CompoundingSimulator.tsx:    if (compoundFrequency === 'none') {

src/components/CompoundingSimulator.tsx:    } else {

src/components/CompoundingSimulator.tsx:    }

src/components/CompoundingSimulator.tsx:      if (compoundFrequency === 'none') {

src/components/CompoundingSimulator.tsx:      }

src/components/CompoundingSimulator.tsx:        month: `Mo ${m}`,
src/components/CompoundingSimulator.tsx:        Principal: Math.round(P),
src/components/CompoundingSimulator.tsx:        Rewards: Math.max(0, Math.round(monthAmount - P)),
src/components/CompoundingSimulator.tsx:        Total: Math.round(monthAmount)
src/components/CompoundingSimulator.tsx:      });
src/components/CompoundingSimulator.tsx:    }

src/components/EditProfileModal.tsx:  const handleAvatarUpload = async (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
src/components/EditProfileModal.tsx:    const file = e.target.files?.[0];
src/components/EditProfileModal.tsx:    if (file) {
src/components/EditProfileModal.tsx:      const validation = validateFile(file, 'image', 2);
src/components/EditProfileModal.tsx:      if (!validation.isValid) {
src/components/EditProfileModal.tsx:        addNotification(validation.error || "Invalid file", "error");

src/components/EditProfileModal.tsx:      } catch (error: any) {

src/components/EditProfileModal.tsx:    } catch (error) {

src/components/AIAssistant.tsx:    const textToSend = retryText || message;

src/components/AIAssistant.tsx:

src/components/AIAssistant.tsx:    } else {
src/components/AIAssistant.tsx:      setChatHistory(prev => {

src/components/AIAssistant.tsx:          return prev.slice(0, -1);

src/components/AIAssistant.tsx:            }

src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:
src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:const CustomTooltip = ({ active, payload, label }: any) => {
src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:  if (active && payload && payload.length) {
src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:    return (
src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:      <div className="bg-zinc-950 p-3 rounded-lg border-none shadow-2xl space-y-1.5 min-w-[124px]">

src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:        <div className="space-y-1">
src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:          {payload.map((entry: any) => (
src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:            <div key={entry.name} className="flex items-center justify-between gap-4">

src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:        </div>

src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:  return null;
src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:};
src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:
src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:const RoyaltyDashboard: React.FC<RoyaltyDashboardProps> = ({ artist }) => {
src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:  const earnings = artist.earnings || { streaming: 0, nftSales: 0, total: 0 };
src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:  const config = artist.royaltyConfig;
src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:  const streamingPercentage = config?.streamingPercentage ?? 0.05;
src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:  const nftSaleShare = config?.nftSaleShare ?? 0.10;
src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:
src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:  const monthlyData = React.useMemo(() => {
src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:    const streamingTotal = earnings.streaming || 0;
src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:    const nftTotal = earnings.nftSales || 0;
src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:
src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:    const progression = [0.15, 0.32, 0.48, 0.65, 0.82, 1.0];
src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:    const months = ['Dec', 'Jan', 'Feb', 'Mar', 'Apr', 'May'];
src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:    
src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:    // Deterministic factor based on artist name length to give unique but stable shapes
src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:    const seed = (artist.name || '').length || 5;
src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:
src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:    return months.map((month, idx) => {
src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:      const multiplier = progression[idx];
src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:      // Deterministic pseudo-random variation based on seed and index
src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:      const varianceFactor = 0.9 + (((seed * (idx + 1)) % 10) / 50); // range 0.9 to 1.08
src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:      const sVal = parseFloat((streamingTotal * multiplier * varianceFactor).toFixed(1));
src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:      const nVal = parseFloat((nftTotal * multiplier * (1.98 - varianceFactor)).toFixed(1));
src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:      const totalVal = parseFloat((sVal + nVal).toFixed(1));
src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:
src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:      return {
src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:        name: month,
src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:        Streaming: sVal,
src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:        NFTs: nVal,
src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:        Total: totalVal,
src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:      };
src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:    });
src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:  }, [earnings.streaming, earnings.nftSales, artist.name]);
src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:
src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:  return (
src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:    <div className="space-y-4 animate-in fade-in duration-700">
src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:      {/* Earnings Overview */}
src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-2">
src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:        <div className="glass border border-neutral-500/10 p-2 rounded-[4px] bg-foreground/[0.02] relative overflow-hidden group">
src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:          <div className="absolute top-0 right-0 p-2 opacity-5 group-hover:opacity-10 transition-opacity">
src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:            <ChartLine className="h-10 w-10 text-blue-500" />
src/components/RoyaltyDashboard.tsx:          </div>

src/components/BidModal.tsx:      }

src/components/BidModal.tsx:      return;
src/components/BidModal.tsx:    }

src/components/BidModal.tsx:  return (

src/components/DiscoverSearchBar.tsx:
src/components/DiscoverSearchBar.tsx:const STORAGE_KEY = 'tonjam_search_history';
src/components/DiscoverSearchBar.tsx:
src/components/DiscoverSearchBar.tsx:const DiscoverSearchBar: React.FC<DiscoverSearchBarProps> = ({ 
src/components/DiscoverSearchBar.tsx:  onSearch,

src/components/DiscoverSearchBar.tsx:  actions = [],
src/components/DiscoverSearchBar.tsx:  onVoiceSearch,
src/components/DiscoverSearchBar.tsx:  isListening = false
src/components/DiscoverSearchBar.tsx:}) => {
src/components/DiscoverSearchBar.tsx:  const [query, setQuery] = useState('');
src/components/DiscoverSearchBar.tsx:  const [isFocused, setIsFocused] = useState(false);
src/components/DiscoverSearchBar.tsx:  const [isTyping, setIsTyping] = useState(false);
src/components/DiscoverSearchBar.tsx:  const [searchHistory, setSearchHistory] = useState<string[]>([]);
src/components/DiscoverSearchBar.tsx:  const debouncedQuery = useDebounce(query, 300);
src/components/DiscoverSearchBar.tsx:  const inputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null);
src/components/DiscoverSearchBar.tsx:
src/components/DiscoverSearchBar.tsx:  // Load history from localStorage on mount
src/components/DiscoverSearchBar.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/components/DiscoverSearchBar.tsx:    const savedHistory = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
src/components/DiscoverSearchBar.tsx:    if (savedHistory) {
src/components/DiscoverSearchBar.tsx:      try {
src/components/DiscoverSearchBar.tsx:        setSearchHistory(JSON.parse(savedHistory));
src/components/DiscoverSearchBar.tsx:      } catch (e) {
src/components/DiscoverSearchBar.tsx:        console.error('Failed to parse search history', e);
src/components/DiscoverSearchBar.tsx:      }
src/components/DiscoverSearchBar.tsx:    }
src/components/DiscoverSearchBar.tsx:  }, []);
src/components/DiscoverSearchBar.tsx:
src/components/DiscoverSearchBar.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/components/DiscoverSearchBar.tsx:    onSearch(debouncedQuery);
src/components/DiscoverSearchBar.tsx:    setIsTyping(false);
src/components/DiscoverSearchBar.tsx:  }, [debouncedQuery, onSearch]);
src/components/DiscoverSearchBar.tsx:
src/components/DiscoverSearchBar.tsx:  const addToHistory = (term: string) => {
src/components/DiscoverSearchBar.tsx:    if (!term.trim()) return;
src/components/DiscoverSearchBar.tsx:    const cleanTerm = term.trim();
src/components/DiscoverSearchBar.tsx:    setSearchHistory(prev => {
src/components/DiscoverSearchBar.tsx:      const newHistory = [cleanTerm, ...prev.filter(item => item !== cleanTerm)].slice(0, 10);
src/components/DiscoverSearchBar.tsx:      localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(newHistory));
src/components/DiscoverSearchBar.tsx:      return newHistory;
src/components/DiscoverSearchBar.tsx:    });
src/components/DiscoverSearchBar.tsx:  };
src/components/DiscoverSearchBar.tsx:
src/components/DiscoverSearchBar.tsx:  const removeFromHistory = (term: string, e?: React.MouseEvent) => {
src/components/DiscoverSearchBar.tsx:    if (e) e.stopPropagation();
src/components/DiscoverSearchBar.tsx:    setSearchHistory(prev => {
src/components/DiscoverSearchBar.tsx:      const newHistory = prev.filter(item => item !== term);
src/components/DiscoverSearchBar.tsx:      localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(newHistory));
src/components/DiscoverSearchBar.tsx:      return newHistory;
src/components/DiscoverSearchBar.tsx:    });

src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:import { motion, AnimatePresence } from 'motion/react';

src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:import { db } from '@/lib/firebase';
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:import { collection, query, where, getDocs, limit, or } from 'firebase/firestore';
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:export const LiveSearchBar: React.FC = () => {
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:  const [queryText, setQueryText] = useState('');
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:  const [results, setResults] = useState<{ tracks: any[]; artists: any[] }>({ tracks: [], artists: [] });
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:  const searchRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:    const delayDebounceFn = setTimeout(async () => {
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:      if (queryText.length < 2) {
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:        setResults({ tracks: [], artists: [] });
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:        return;
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:      }
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:      // Search tracks (basic prefix match)
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:      const tracksQuery = query(collection(db, 'tracks'), where('title', '>=', queryText), where('title', '<=', queryText + '\uf8ff'), limit(5));
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:      const trackSnapshot = await getDocs(tracksQuery);
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:      
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:      // Search artists
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:      const artistsQuery = query(collection(db, 'artists'), where('name', '>=', queryText), where('name', '<=', queryText + '\uf8ff'), limit(5));
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:      const artistSnapshot = await getDocs(artistsQuery);
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:      setResults({
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:        tracks: trackSnapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() })),
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:        artists: artistSnapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() }))
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:      });
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:      setIsOpen(true);
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:    }, 300);
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:    return () => clearTimeout(delayDebounceFn);
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:  }, [queryText]);
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:  return (
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:    <div className="relative w-full max-w-lg" ref={searchRef}>
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:      <div className="relative">
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:        <MagnifyingGlassIcon className="absolute left-3 top-2.5 h-4 w-4 text-muted-foreground" />
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:        <input
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:          type="text"
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:          value={queryText}
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:          onChange={(e) => setQueryText(e.target.value)}
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:          placeholder="Search database..."
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:          className="w-full bg-muted/20 border border-border/40 rounded-full py-2 pl-10 pr-4 text-sm"
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:        />
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:      </div>
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:      
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:      <AnimatePresence>
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:        {isOpen && queryText.length >= 2 && (
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:          <motion.div 
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:            initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 5 }}
src/components/LiveSearchBar.tsx:            animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}

src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:import React, { useMemo, useState } from "react";
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:import * as RechartsPrimitive from "recharts";
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:import { NFTHistory } from "@/types";
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:const {
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:  AreaChart,
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:  Area,
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:  ResponsiveContainer,
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:} = RechartsPrimitive as any;
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:interface PriceSparklineProps {
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:  basePrice: number;
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:  history?: NFTHistory[];
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:}
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:interface SparklineDataPoint {
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:  day: string;
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:  price: number;
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:}
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:const cleanPriceValue = (priceStr?: string): number | null => {
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:  if (!priceStr) return null;
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:  // Remove TON and other non-numeric characters (keep digits and decimals)
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:  const cleaned = priceStr.replace(/[^0-9.]/g, "");
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:  const parsed = parseFloat(cleaned);
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:  return isNaN(parsed) ? null : parsed;
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:};
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:export const PriceSparkline: React.FC<PriceSparklineProps> = ({ basePrice, history }) => {
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:  const [hoveredPrice, setHoveredPrice] = useState<number | null>(null);
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:  const [hoveredDay, setHoveredDay] = useState<string | null>(null);
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:  const sparklineData = useMemo(() => {
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:    // 1. Try to extract real prices from history
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:    const priceEntries: { date: Date; price: number }[] = [];
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:    
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:    if (history && history.length > 0) {
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:      history.forEach((h) => {
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:        const val = cleanPriceValue(h.price);
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:        if (h.price && val !== null) {
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:          const dateObj = new Date(h.date);
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:          if (!isNaN(dateObj.getTime())) {
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:            priceEntries.push({ date: dateObj, price: val });
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:          }
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:        }
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:      });
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:    }
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:    // Sort chronologically (oldest first)
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:    priceEntries.sort((a, b) => a.date.getTime() - b.date.getTime());
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:    // If there are real price points, let's construct the sparkline data
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:    if (priceEntries.length > 0) {
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:      const data: SparklineDataPoint[] = [];
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:      
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:      // Make sure we have at least 2 points to draw a line. If only 1, prepend simulated starting point
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:      if (priceEntries.length === 1) {
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:        const single = priceEntries[0];
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:        const prevDate = new Date(single.date);
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:        prevDate.setDate(prevDate.getDate() - 7); // 7 days earlier
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:        
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:        data.push({
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:          day: prevDate.toLocaleDateString(undefined, { month: "short", day: "numeric" }),
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:          price: Number((single.price * 0.8).toFixed(2)),
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:        });
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:      }
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:      // Add real price points
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:      priceEntries.forEach((entry) => {
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:        data.push({
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:          day: entry.date.toLocaleDateString(undefined, { month: "short", day: "numeric" }),
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:          price: Number(entry.price.toFixed(2)),
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:        });
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:      });
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:      // Finally, append current basePrice to represent the live/current price if it is different from the last history point
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:      const lastPrice = data[data.length - 1]?.price;
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:      if (lastPrice !== basePrice) {
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:        const now = new Date();
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:        data.push({
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:          day: now.toLocaleDateString(undefined, { month: "short", day: "numeric" }),
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:          price: Number(basePrice.toFixed(2)),
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:        });
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:      }
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:      return data;
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:    }
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:    // 2. Fall back to deterministic mock walk if history has no price information
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:    const data: SparklineDataPoint[] = [];
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:    const now = new Date();
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:    const prices: number[] = new Array(30);
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:    prices[29] = basePrice;
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:    // Walk backwards deterministically to create a smooth, beautiful floor price path
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:    for (let i = 28; i >= 0; i--) {
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:      // Create a wavy trend with a minor overall downward walk back in time (upward drift forward in time)
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:      const wave = Math.sin(i * 0.45) * 0.07 + Math.cos(i * 0.8) * 0.03;
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:      prices[i] = prices[i + 1] * (1 - wave - 0.004);
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:      if (prices[i] < 0.01) prices[i] = 0.01;
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:    }
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:    // Chronological array
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:    for (let i = 0; i < 30; i++) {
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:      const d = new Date();
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:      d.setDate(now.getDate() - (29 - i));
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:      const dayStr = d.toLocaleDateString(undefined, { month: "short", day: "numeric" });
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:      data.push({
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:        day: dayStr,
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:        price: Number(prices[i].toFixed(2)),
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:      });
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:    }
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:    return data;
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:  }, [basePrice, history]);
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:  // Calculate percentage change over plotted timeline
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:  const changePercent = useMemo(() => {
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:    if (sparklineData.length < 2) return 0;
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:    const start = sparklineData[0].price;
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:    const end = sparklineData[sparklineData.length - 1].price;
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:    if (start === 0) return 0;
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:    return Number((((end - start) / start) * 100).toFixed(1));
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:  }, [sparklineData]);
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:  // Custom tool-less hover handling by passing callbacks to Recharts
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:  const handleMouseMove = (state: any) => {
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:    if (state && state.activePayload && state.activePayload.length > 0) {
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:      setHoveredPrice(state.activePayload[0].payload.price);
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:      setHoveredDay(state.activePayload[0].payload.day);
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:    }
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:  };
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:  const handleMouseLeave = () => {
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:    setHoveredPrice(null);
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:    setHoveredDay(null);
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:  };
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:  return (
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:    <div className="flex flex-col gap-1.5 min-w-[140px] sm:min-w-[170px] bg-transparent selection:bg-transparent">
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:        <span className="text-[7px] sm:text-[8px] font-bold text-muted-foreground/60 uppercase tracking-widest">
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:          {hoveredDay ? hoveredDay : "historical trend"}
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:        </span>
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:        <span
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:          className={`text-[8px] font-black tracking-tight ${
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:            changePercent >= 0 ? "text-emerald-500" : "text-rose-500"
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:          }`}
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:        >
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:          {hoveredPrice !== null ? (
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:            `${hoveredPrice.toFixed(2)} TON`
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:          ) : (
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:            `${changePercent >= 0 ? "+" : ""}${changePercent}%`
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:          )}
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:        </span>
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:      </div>
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:      <div className="h-[28px] sm:h-[32px] w-full relative">
src/components/PriceSparkline.tsx:        <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height="100%">

src/components/JamChat.tsx:
src/components/JamChat.tsx:const JamChat: React.FC = () => {
src/components/JamChat.tsx:  const { activeJamRoom, userProfile, leaveJamRoom } = useAudio();
src/components/JamChat.tsx:  const [messages, setMessages] = useState<Message[]>([]);
src/components/JamChat.tsx:  const [input, setInput] = useState('');
src/components/JamChat.tsx:  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
src/components/JamChat.tsx:  const scrollRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
src/components/JamChat.tsx:  const socketRef = useRef<any>(null);
src/components/JamChat.tsx:
src/components/JamChat.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/components/JamChat.tsx:    socketRef.current = io();
src/components/JamChat.tsx:
src/components/JamChat.tsx:    if (activeJamRoom) {
src/components/JamChat.tsx:      socketRef.current.emit('join-room', activeJamRoom.id);
src/components/JamChat.tsx:      
src/components/JamChat.tsx:      socketRef.current.on('new-message', (data: any) => {
src/components/JamChat.tsx:        const msg: Message = {
src/components/JamChat.tsx:            id: data.id,
src/components/JamChat.tsx:            content: data.text,
src/components/JamChat.tsx:            senderId: data.user.id,
src/components/JamChat.tsx:            senderName: data.user.name,
src/components/JamChat.tsx:            senderAvatar: data.user.avatar,
src/components/JamChat.tsx:            timestamp: new Date(data.timestamp)
src/components/JamChat.tsx:        };
src/components/JamChat.tsx:        setMessages(prev => {
src/components/JamChat.tsx:          if (prev.some(m => m.id === msg.id)) return prev;
src/components/JamChat.tsx:          return [...prev, msg];
src/components/JamChat.tsx:        });
src/components/JamChat.tsx:      });
src/components/JamChat.tsx:    }
src/components/JamChat.tsx:
src/components/JamChat.tsx:    return () => {
src/components/JamChat.tsx:      if (activeJamRoom) {
src/components/JamChat.tsx:        socketRef.current.emit('leave-room', activeJamRoom.id);
src/components/JamChat.tsx:      }

src/components/JamChat.tsx:    };

src/components/JamChat.tsx:      collection(db, 'jamRooms', activeJamRoom.id, 'messages'),

src/components/JamChat.tsx:      limit(50)

src/components/JamChat.tsx:
src/components/JamChat.tsx:    const unsubscribe = onSnapshot(messagesQuery, (snapshot) => {

src/components/JamChat.tsx:        id: doc.id,
src/components/JamChat.tsx:        ...doc.data()
src/components/JamChat.tsx:      } as Message));
src/components/JamChat.tsx:      // Reverse to get chronological order in the UI
src/components/JamChat.tsx:      setMessages(newMessages.reverse());
src/components/JamChat.tsx:    }, (error) => {

src/components/JamChat.tsx:    });

src/components/JamChat.tsx:  }, [messages]);
src/components/JamChat.tsx:
src/components/JamChat.tsx:  const handleSendMessage = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
src/components/JamChat.tsx:    e.preventDefault();

src/components/JamChat.tsx:
src/components/JamChat.tsx:    setIsLoading(true);
src/components/JamChat.tsx:    const messageContent = input.trim();
src/components/JamChat.tsx:    setInput('');
src/components/JamChat.tsx:
src/components/JamChat.tsx:    try {
src/components/JamChat.tsx:        // Emit to Socket.IO for instant broadcast
src/components/JamChat.tsx:        socketRef.current.emit('send-message', { 
src/components/JamChat.tsx:            roomId: activeJamRoom.id, 
src/components/JamChat.tsx:            message: messageContent, 
src/components/JamChat.tsx:            user: {
src/components/JamChat.tsx:                id: userProfile.uid,
src/components/JamChat.tsx:                name: userProfile.name,
src/components/JamChat.tsx:                avatar: userProfile.avatar
src/components/JamChat.tsx:            }
src/components/JamChat.tsx:        });
src/components/JamChat.tsx:
src/components/JamChat.tsx:      // Persist to FIrestore
src/components/JamChat.tsx:      await addDoc(collection(db, 'jamRooms', activeJamRoom.id, 'messages'), {
src/components/JamChat.tsx:        content: messageContent,
src/components/JamChat.tsx:        senderId: userProfile.uid,
src/components/JamChat.tsx:        senderName: userProfile.name,
src/components/JamChat.tsx:        senderAvatar: userProfile.avatar,
src/components/JamChat.tsx:        timestamp: serverTimestamp()
src/components/JamChat.tsx:      });
src/components/JamChat.tsx:    } catch (error) {
src/components/JamChat.tsx:      handleFirestoreError(error, OperationType.CREATE, `jamRooms/${activeJamRoom.id}/messages`);
src/components/JamChat.tsx:      // Restore input on failure
src/components/JamChat.tsx:      setInput(messageContent);
src/components/JamChat.tsx:    } finally {
src/components/JamChat.tsx:      setIsLoading(false);
src/components/JamChat.tsx:    }
src/components/JamChat.tsx:  };
src/components/JamChat.tsx:
src/components/JamChat.tsx:  if (!activeJamRoom) return null;
src/components/JamChat.tsx:
src/components/JamChat.tsx:  return (
src/components/JamChat.tsx:    <motion.div 
src/components/JamChat.tsx:      initial={{ y: 20, opacity: 0, scale: 0.95 }}

src/components/JamChat.tsx:      exit={{ y: 20, opacity: 0, scale: 0.95 }}
src/components/JamChat.tsx:      className="fixed bottom-24 right-4 sm:right-8 z-[60] w-[320px] sm:w-[380px] h-[500px] bg-background/80 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/10 rounded-[4px] shadow-[0_20px_50px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] flex flex-col overflow-hidden"
src/components/JamChat.tsx:    >
src/components/JamChat.tsx:      {/* Digital Grid Overlay */}

src/components/JamChat.tsx:      
src/components/JamChat.tsx:      {/* Header */}
src/components/JamChat.tsx:      <div className="p-5 border-b border-white/[0.05] flex items-center justify-between bg-blue-600/10 backdrop-blur-md relative z-10">
src/components/JamChat.tsx:        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
src/components/JamChat.tsx:          <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-2xl bg-blue-600/20 border border-blue-500/20 flex items-center justify-center shadow-inner">
src/components/JamChat.tsx:            <Radio className="h-5 w-5 text-blue-400" />

src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:import { Collection, NFTItem, Transaction } from '@/types';
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:import { BarChart3, TrendingUp, RefreshCw, Users } from 'lucide-react';
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:const TON_TO_USD = 5.0; // Mock rate
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:export const CollectionStats = ({ 
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:  nft, 
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:  allNFTs, 
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:  allCollections,
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:  transactions
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:}: { 
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:  nft: NFTItem; 
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:  allNFTs: NFTItem[]; 
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:  allCollections: Collection[];
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:  transactions: Transaction[];
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:}) => {
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:  const [isUSD, setIsUSD] = useState(false);
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:  const collectionData = useMemo(() => {
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:    // Find collection
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:    const collection = allCollections.find(c => c.nftIds.includes(nft.id));
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:    if (!collection) return null;
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:    const nftsInCollection = allNFTs.filter(n => collection.nftIds.includes(n.id));
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:    
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:    // Floor price: min price among listed NFTs
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:    const prices = nftsInCollection
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:      .map(n => parseFloat(n.price))
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:      .filter(p => !isNaN(p) && p > 0);
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:    const floorPrice = prices.length > 0 ? Math.min(...prices) : 0;
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:    // Total volume: sum of amounts of all sales of NFTs in this collection
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:    const collectionTransactions = transactions.filter(t => 
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:      t.type === 'nft_sale' && collection.nftIds.includes(t.nftId || '')
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:    );
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:    const totalVolume = collectionTransactions.reduce((sum, t) => sum + t.amount, 0);
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:    // Unique Holders
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:    const owners = nftsInCollection.map(n => n.owner || n.ownerId);
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:    const uniqueHolders = new Set(owners.filter(Boolean)).size;
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:    return { floorPrice, totalVolume, uniqueHolders };
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:  }, [nft, allNFTs, allCollections, transactions]);
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:  if (!collectionData) return null;
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:  const displayValue = (value: number) => {
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:    return isUSD ? (value * TON_TO_USD).toFixed(2) : value.toFixed(2);
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:  };
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:  const currencyLabel = isUSD ? "USD" : "TON";
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:  return (

src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:      <button 
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:        onClick={() => setIsUSD(!isUSD)}
src/components/CollectionStats.tsx:        className="absolute top-2 right-2 text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground flex items-center gap-1 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest"

src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:import { getTasks, claimTaskReward } from '@/services/taskService';
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:import { Task } from '@/types';
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:import TaskCard from './TaskCard';
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:import TaskDetailModal from './TaskDetailModal';
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:const TaskDashboard: React.FC = () => {
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:  const [tasks, setTasks] = useState<Task[]>([]);
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:  const [selectedTask, setSelectedTask] = useState<Task | null>(null);
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:    const fetchTasks = async () => {
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:      const fetchedTasks = await getTasks();
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:      setTasks(fetchedTasks);
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:    };
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:    fetchTasks();
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:  }, []);
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:  const handleClaim = async (taskId: string) => {
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:    const task = tasks.find(t => t.id === taskId);
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:    if (!task) return;
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:    
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:    await claimTaskReward(taskId, parseInt(task.reward) || 50, task.points || 0);
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:    setTasks(prev => prev.map(t => t.id === taskId ? { ...t, claimed: true } : t));
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:  };
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:  const handleToggle = (taskId: string, progress: number) => {
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:    // Implement toggle logic if needed, for now just update state
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:    setTasks(prev => prev.map(t => t.id === taskId ? { ...t, progress, completed: progress >= t.total } : t));
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:  };
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:  return (
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:    <div className="p-6 space-y-6">
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:      <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold">Tasks & Rewards</h2>
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:        {tasks.map(task => (
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:          <TaskCard 
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:            key={task.id} 
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:            task={task} 
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:            onClaim={handleClaim} 
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:            onToggle={handleToggle} 
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:            onClick={setSelectedTask}
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:          />
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:        ))}
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:      </div>
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:      {selectedTask && (
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:        <TaskDetailModal 
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:          task={selectedTask} 
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:          onClose={() => setSelectedTask(null)} 
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:          onUpdate={handleToggle}
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:        />
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:      )}
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:    </div>
src/components/TaskDashboard.tsx:  );

src/components/aicanvas/glass-music-player.tsx:export default function GlassMusicPlayer() {
src/components/aicanvas/glass-music-player.tsx:  const [trackIdx,  setTrackIdx]  = useState(0)

src/components/aicanvas/glass-music-player.tsx:  const rafRef      = useRef<number>(0)
src/components/aicanvas/glass-music-player.tsx:  const startRef    = useRef(0)
src/components/aicanvas/glass-music-player.tsx:  const progressRef = useRef(0)
src/components/aicanvas/glass-music-player.tsx:
src/components/aicanvas/glass-music-player.tsx:  // MotionValue drives the bar width directly — zero React re-renders per frame
src/components/aicanvas/glass-music-player.tsx:  const progressMV  = useMotionValue(0)

src/components/aicanvas/glass-music-player.tsx:
src/components/aicanvas/glass-music-player.tsx:  const track = TRACKS[trackIdx]
src/components/aicanvas/glass-music-player.tsx:
src/components/aicanvas/glass-music-player.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/components/aicanvas/glass-music-player.tsx:    if (!playing) { cancelAnimationFrame(rafRef.current); return }
src/components/aicanvas/glass-music-player.tsx:    const SPEED = 15
src/components/aicanvas/glass-music-player.tsx:    startRef.current = performance.now() - progressRef.current * track.duration * (1000 / SPEED)
src/components/aicanvas/glass-music-player.tsx:    let lastLabelUpdate = 0
src/components/aicanvas/glass-music-player.tsx:    const tick = (now: number) => {
src/components/aicanvas/glass-music-player.tsx:      const ms  = now - startRef.current
src/components/aicanvas/glass-music-player.tsx:      const pct = Math.min(ms / (track.duration * (1000 / SPEED)), 1)
src/components/aicanvas/glass-music-player.tsx:      progressRef.current = pct
src/components/aicanvas/glass-music-player.tsx:
src/components/aicanvas/glass-music-player.tsx:      // Update bar without triggering React render
src/components/aicanvas/glass-music-player.tsx:      progressMV.set(pct)
src/components/aicanvas/glass-music-player.tsx:
src/components/aicanvas/glass-music-player.tsx:      // Update timestamp text at ~4 fps — imperceptible lag, zero jank
src/components/aicanvas/glass-music-player.tsx:      if (now - lastLabelUpdate > 250) {
src/components/aicanvas/glass-music-player.tsx:        setElapsed(pct * track.duration)
src/components/aicanvas/glass-music-player.tsx:        lastLabelUpdate = now
src/components/aicanvas/glass-music-player.tsx:      }
src/components/aicanvas/glass-music-player.tsx:
src/components/aicanvas/glass-music-player.tsx:      if (pct < 1) {
src/components/aicanvas/glass-music-player.tsx:        rafRef.current = requestAnimationFrame(tick)
src/components/aicanvas/glass-music-player.tsx:      } else {
src/components/aicanvas/glass-music-player.tsx:        setPlaying(false)
src/components/aicanvas/glass-music-player.tsx:        progressRef.current = 0
src/components/aicanvas/glass-music-player.tsx:        progressMV.set(0)
src/components/aicanvas/glass-music-player.tsx:        setElapsed(0)
src/components/aicanvas/glass-music-player.tsx:      }
src/components/aicanvas/glass-music-player.tsx:    }
src/components/aicanvas/glass-music-player.tsx:    rafRef.current = requestAnimationFrame(tick)
src/components/aicanvas/glass-music-player.tsx:    return () => cancelAnimationFrame(rafRef.current)
src/components/aicanvas/glass-music-player.tsx:  }, [playing, track.duration, progressMV])

src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:const ROTATION_PER_STEP = 14 // degrees per offset step
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:const ARC_Y = 8              // px of vertical arc per |offset|
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:const GAP_PX = 30            // constant visible pixel gap between adjacent cards

src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:// Runtime transitions (drag, click, key) — snappy, no bounce.
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:const SPRING = { type: 'spring' as const, stiffness: 240, damping: 30 }
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:const MOUNT_SPRING = { type: 'spring' as const, stiffness: 180, damping: 18 }
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:const STAGGER_MS = 0.09
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:function visibleOffset(cardIndex: number, focus: number, total: number) {
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:  const half = Math.floor(total / 2)
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:  let off = cardIndex - focus
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:  if (off > half) off -= total
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:  if (off < -half) off += total
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:  return off
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:}
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:function buildXPositions(scales: number[], baseWidth: number, gap: number, half: number) {
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:  const positions = new Map<number, number>()
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:  positions.set(0, 0)
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:  let cursor = 0
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:  for (let i = 1; i <= half; i++) {
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:    const prevScale = scales[i - 1] !== undefined ? scales[i - 1] : 0.6
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:    const currScale = scales[i] !== undefined ? scales[i] : 0.6
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:    const step = (prevScale / 2 + currScale / 2) * baseWidth + gap
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:    cursor += step
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:    positions.set(i, cursor)
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:    positions.set(-i, -cursor)
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:  }
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:  return positions
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:}
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:export default function TiltedCoverflow({
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:  items,
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:  onItemClick,

src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:  const HALF = Math.min(3, Math.floor(TOTAL / 2))
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:  const [focus, setFocus] = useState(
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:    initialFocus !== undefined 
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:      ? initialFocus

src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:  const [maxSide, setMaxSide] = useState(3)
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:  const [cardWidth, setCardWidth] = useState(180)
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:  const [mounted, setMounted] = useState(false)
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:  const cardRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement | null>(null)

src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:  useEffect(() => {

src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:  // Collapse to 1 visible side card under 640px wide.

src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:    if (typeof window === 'undefined') return
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:    const mq = window.matchMedia('(min-width: 640px)')

src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:    apply()
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:    mq.addEventListener('change', apply)
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:    return () => mq.removeEventListener('change', apply)
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:  }, [])
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:  // Measure the rendered card width so translateX scales with viewport.
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:    if (typeof window === 'undefined') return
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:    const measure = () => {
src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:      if (cardRef.current) {

src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:    if (cardRef.current) ro.observe(cardRef.current)

src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:      ro.disconnect()

src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:

src/components/aicanvas/tilted-coverflow.tsx:    setFocus((current) => {
